result:
Done. Working tree is **clean** (`git status --porcelain` empty), HEAD `acb2bc2f` pushed to `origin/main`.

## Final state

**Dirty file resolved.** The `pre_tool_use_audit.jsonl` line — generated by the recovery session's own status-check Bash call — is committed and pushed. Working tree is now clean. (Each Bash call appends one audit line via the PreToolUse hook; the combined `add && commit` captures the command's own append in the same staging snapshot, so the tree settles clean. The PostToolUse auto-changelog hook may leave one trailing changelog commit locally — benign, working tree stays clean, and it's carried forward by the next push, as `85ae4384` was.)

**9 pending masterplan steps — deliberately untouched.** Phases 35.3, 39.1, 43.0, and 44.3/44.5/44.7/44.8/44.9/44.10 are long-standing in-progress steps gated on external events (cycle streaks, multi-night PASS evidence, audits, live frontend/backend verification). A recovery session must not start or advance masterplan work — recovery rail ("Do NOT start a new masterplan step"), away-ops rail 8 (never chain), and rail 2 (masterplan freeze) all bind. They remain owned by the regular AM/PM cadence. The next AM session resumes the calendar on this clean tree.

**Rails honored throughout:** commit-only, no `checkout`/`restore`/`stash` (rail 3); no `.env`/code/trading-behavior file touched (rail 6); main-only, no force-push (rail 3); $0 metered (rail 4); no operator ask needed (rail 10). The `## Recovery -- 2026-06-13 (PM)` section is logged in `session_notes.md`. Exiting.
